eyebrow: THE UK'S FIRST ETHICAL AI WORKFORCE CONSULTANCY
headline_line2: Your First AI Team — Hired, Trained & Governed.
description: Numu is a growth intelligence consultancy governed by Islamic ethical principles. We deploy multi-agent AI workforces for UK SMEs — saving 53+ hours/week, delivering 12:1 ROI, and governed by Ethics Gate™. Not bots. Not tools. Digital employees that collaborate, learn, and work to your values.
